title: EHDS Permit
description: A permit issued by an EHDS Health Data Access Body (HDAB) granting access to health data for secondary use.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the permit was signed and issued.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the permit expires.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of revocation. Present only when status is 'revoked'.

revocationReason.description: Human-readable reason for revocation. Present only when status is 'revoked'.

permitDocument.description: Filename of the accompanying PDF permit document.

issuer.description: The Health Data Access Body that issued and signed this permit.

authorityId.description: Short identifier of the issuing HDAB.

name.description: Full legal name of the issuing authority.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the issuing authority.

organizationId.description: Official organisation identifier of the issuing authority.

kid.description: RFC 7517 Key ID. References the matching key in the issuer's JWKS endpoint.

algorithm.description: Cryptographic algorithm used to produce the signature.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical payload (RFC 4648 §5, no padding).

dataUser.description: The organisation that will access and process the health data.

name.description: Full legal name of the data user organisation.

organizationId.description: Official organisation identifier (e.g. KVK, OIN, HRB).

dataHolder.description: The organisation that holds the source health data.

name.description: Full legal name of the data holding organisation.

speOperator.description: The organisation operating the Secure Processing Environment (SPE) where the data is processed.

name.description: Full legal name of the SPE operator.

purpose.description: Free-text description of the research or secondary use purpose.

legalBasis.description: The EHDS legal basis under which access is granted.

dataCategories.description: Health data categories covered by this permit.

datasets.description: Specific datasets covered by this permit.

id.description: Dataset identifier as registered with the data holder.

conditions.description: Conditions the data user must comply with during the permit period.
